05 Live — Tour & Consult

We Visit Hajimekensetsu Properties.
You Watch Live.

Our agent physically visits Hajimekensetsu properties on your behalf — livestreamed via Zoom or Google Meet. You see the actual home, ask questions in real time, and decide. No flight required.

Live Hajimekensetsu Property Tour — Our agent physically visits the property and streams it to you via Zoom. Ask questions in real time.
Live ROI Review — Share your simulator results and we'll verify them against actual Hajimekensetsu listing prices and AirDNA data.
Multilingual — English, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Vietnamese, Japanese.

07 Data — Hajimekensetsu × Market Facts

Hajimekensetsu.
The Numbers.

216,400 homes. Seismic Grade 3. 35-year transferable warranty. Insulation Grade 5. These are Hajimekensetsu's numbers — verified, dated, and the foundation of every investment we facilitate.

Why Act Now

The Yen Window
Is Still Open

USD/JPY at 150+ means Japanese properties are 27% cheaper in USD than they were in 2019. Bank of Japan rates remain historically low. Osaka inbound tourism hit a record 36.87M visitors in 2024. Every month you wait, prices adjust.

USDJPY long-term chart / BOJ Policy Rate Statement Dec 2024 / JNTO 2024
Osaka Expo 2025 sustained a 14% QoQ jump in STR occupancy
IR (Casino Resort) approval targets 2029 — Namba/Yumeshima premium expected
New Airbnb Minpaku Act reform expanding STR allowable days in 2026
